---
title: "AYU - Individual Week 1"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
editor: visual
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, eval = FALSE)
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Instruction**: *Scan your answer into pdf/word document then submit to Canvas.*
---

## Question 1

Let $y_t = 3 + \epsilon_t$, where $\epsilon_t$ is the face value of rolling a fair die.  

## Question 2 

Is this following time series stationary?  Explain your answers. 

a. $y_t = 1 + 2t + \epsilon_t$ where $\epsilon_t \sim N(0, 1)$

b. $y_t = 3 + \epsilon_t$ where $\epsilon_t \sim N(0, t)$

## Question 3 

Given the following time series.

| t   | $y_t$ |
|:----|:------|
| 1   | 1     |
| 2   | 3     |
| 3   | 5     |
| 4   | 8     |
| 5   | 12    |
| 6   | 13    |
| 7   | 16    |

Calculate the auto-covariance at lag 1.

## Question 4 

Given the following time series.

| t   | $y_t$ |
|:----|:------|
| 1   | 1     |
| 2   | 3     |
| 3   | 5     |
| 4   | 8     |
| 5   | 12    |
| 6   | 13    |
| 7   | 16    |

Calculate the auto-correlation at lag 1.

## Question 5

Given $$y_t = Z_t + .8 Z_{t-2},$$ where $Z_t \sim^{iid} N(0,1)$. 

a. Find the autocovariance and autocorrelation functions for this time series.

b. Compute the variance of the sample mean $(X_1+X_2+X_3+X_4)/4$

------------------------------------------------------------------------
